info.name: Grow Up More — Phase 8: Material Management
info.description: Phase 8 endpoints — Subjects, Chapters, Topics, Sub-topics + translations with 4-slot image uploads (icon, image, ogImage, twitterImage).

item.name: Subjects
item.description: Subjects — parent CRUD + translation sub-resource with Bunny image slots (icon, image, ogImage, twitterImage).

request.description: Partial update — JSON only at the parent level.
Create translation, multipart/form-data with text fields + all 4 image slots. Attach PNG/JPEG/WebP files locally before sending.
Create translation, multipart/form-data with text fields + icon slot.
Update translation, JSON body, text only (no image change).
Update translation, multipart, one text field + icon file.
Update translation, multipart, text + all 4 image slots.
Update translation, multipart, only icon file (no text change).
Update translation, multipart, all 4 image slots without text change.
